channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Weekly)

item.title: 📝 0xdeadbeefnetwork/ssh-keysign-pwn (624 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: 0xdeadbeefnetwork

📝 Repository: 0xdeadbeefnetwork/ssh-keysign-pwn

item.title: 📝 X-3306/Project-Onyx (89 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: X-3306

📝 Repository: X-3306/Project-Onyx

📄 Descrizione: Advanced EDR Evasion via AI Telemetry Spoofing & WASM Sandboxing. Project Onyx is a PoC Red Team pipeline designed to demonstrate advanced evasion techniques against modern EDR systems. It shifts away from traditional signature-based obfuscation towards behavioral camouflage and strict environmental keying.

⭐ Stelle: 89

🍴 Forks: 11

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: ai av-bypass chain cpp cryptography edr-evasion in-memory-execution malware-development monolithic onnx onnxruntime redteam reverse-engineering security-research systems-security wasm webassembly windows

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-24T20:14:02Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-29T12:32:13Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 0xSV1/ghosttype-bof (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: 0xSV1

📝 Repository: 0xSV1/ghosttype-bof

📄 Descrizione: BOF that scans Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and ChatGPT Desktop conversation histories for exposed credentials. Should work with any COFF-loader compatitble C2.

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: C
